notes: Cross-reference validation of all routes using Rizal Avenue (Monumento to Quiapo), Rizal Avenue Extension (Caloocan segment), A. Bonifacio Ave, and Malabon/Navotas side corridors (Letre/Acacia/H. Lopez Blvd). Also includes Marikina internal routes (T215/T217/T271) not captured in Aurora Blvd or Marcos Hwy corridors. See analysis/validated-rizal-avenue-marikina-corridor.md for full analysis.

routes.route_name: Route 17 — Monumento–EDSA Taft via Rizal Ave
routes.origin: Araneta Square Mall, Samson Rd, Caloocan
routes.notes: LTFRB Route 17. LRT-1 augmentation bus along Rizal Ave corridor. Return trip via P. Zamora, Pasay → Monumento. Confirmed in LTFRB MC 2020-019, ltoportal.ph, monumento-terminal data. Operator: Lippad Trans (per OSM; also others under rationalization).

routes.route_name: Monumento–P. Villanueva, Pasay via Rizal Ave
routes.frequency_notes: Daily; every 5–10 min (high-frequency corridor); ~66 min trip
routes.notes: 52 stops, ~66 min trip (Moovit). One of the longest jeepney routes in Metro Manila. Covers full Rizal Ave from Caloocan to Pasay. Also has F.B. Harrison–Areneta Square variant (64 stops, ~72 min). Sources: Monumento terminal data, Moovit.
Shorter Rizal Ave route; central Manila segment only. Sources: Monumento terminal data, Moovit (29 stops, ~31 min).

LTFRB T-code T378. Operator: Monumento-Blumentritt-Baclaran Transport Cooperative. OSM geometry confirmed (136 members). Only route in this corridor with mapped geometry. Via Mabini variant (L. Guinto variant is separate). Sources: OSM, multiple community.

routes.route_name: Blumentritt–Pasay RTDA via Sta. Cruz, L. Guinto
routes.notes: L. Guinto variant of the Blumentritt–Pasay route (parallel to Mabini). Multiple sources confirm. RTDA = Rotonda Transit Departure Area. Sources: Sakay, Blumentritt terminal data.

routes.route_name: Blumentritt–Libertad via Sta. Cruz, L. Guinto
routes.notes: Extends past Pasay RTDA to Libertad. Multiple sources confirm. Sources: Sakay, terminal data, community.
Mabini variant; runs parallel to L. Guinto. Distinct from RIZAL-JEEP-005. Sources: Multiple.
Modern PUJ. Nova-Blumentritt Cooperative. 15 units confirmed by PNA. Fare ₱15 base + ₱2.20/km. Sources: PNA news, other-major-terminals data.

routes.route_name: T109: Novaliches–Rizal Ave. via A. Bonifacio
routes.notes: LTFRB T109. Listed in MC 2020-029 Annex A. Connects Novaliches to Rizal Ave junction via A. Bonifacio Ave. Source: LTFRB official.

routes.route_name: España–Blumentritt via Rizal Ave / Leonor Rivera
routes.notes: Short inner-Manila route connecting España corridor to Blumentritt station area. Sources: ph.commutetour.com, community.
Moovit confirmed JEEP route. NOTE: 'Cavite St.' is in QC near Sampaloc, NOT Cavite Province. Very short route. Source: Moovit.

routes.origin: Ferdinand Blumentritt / Aurora Blvd Intersection, QC
routes.notes: NOTE: This is Ferdinand Blumentritt St. in QC near Aurora Blvd — NOT Manila's Blumentritt Station area. QC internal route. Runs until midnight. Source: Moovit.

routes.route_name: Route 514: Monumento–Vito Cruz via Rizal Ave, Mabini
routes.notes: Old pre-PUVMP route code 514. May be discontinued or absorbed. Community route list source only. Monumento terminal data reference. Status uncertain.
Short Caloocan-Manila route via Rizal Ave. Single primary source (other-major-terminals). Felix Huertas and Oroquieta are cross-streets in Sta. Cruz, Manila.
LTFRB T-code T104. Confirmed in MC 2020-029 Annex A, Monumento terminal data, and OSM wiki. Primary Malabon–Caloocan connector via Letre Road.
LTFRB T-code T115. Confirmed in MC 2020-029 Annex A, Monumento terminal data. Alternative Letre Road alignment — uses Acacia Road instead. Both T104 and T115 operate concurrently.
LTFRB T-code T107. Confirmed in MC 2020-029 Annex A, Monumento terminal. Extends beyond T104 Malabon route into Navotas. Via Letre Road through Malabon.
LTFRB T-code T105. Referenced in MC 2020-029. Internal CAMANAVA route; does not directly serve Monumento or Rizal Ave. Limited detail available.
Sakay confirmed T-code T3114. H. Lopez Blvd corridor through Tondo/Navotas. Different from Monumento–Navotas (uses Divisoria as western terminus, not Monumento).
Sakay confirmed T-code T3170. Parallel to T3114 but terminates at Gasak barangay. Same H. Lopez corridor.
LTFRB T-code T106. Listed in MC 2020-029 Annex A. Short intra-Caloocan route between MCU and Sangandaan sub-district. Sources: LTFRB official.
LTFRB T-code T121. MC 2020-029 reference. Crosses Valenzuela–Caloocan boundary via Tenejeros area. Sangandaan is the Caloocan node.
LTFRB T-code T171. Single source (LTFRB franchise list). Short local Caloocan route. Orphan — needs Moovit or Sakay confirmation.

routes.route_name: T3157: Malinta–Recto via F. Huertas, Oroquieta
routes.notes: Sakay confirmed T-code T3157. Valenzuela→Manila route via MacArthur Hwy, entering Rizal Ave corridor, turning at Felix Huertas/Oroquieta to Recto. Source: Sakay.

routes.route_name: T3158: Malinta–Sta. Cruz via F. Huertas, Oroquieta
routes.notes: Sakay confirmed T-code T3158. Companion to T3157 — terminates at Sta. Cruz instead of Recto. Same MacArthur Hwy→Rizal Ave corridor. Source: Sakay.

routes.route_name: Valenzuela–Plaza Sta. Cruz via MacArthur Hwy
routes.notes: Moovit confirmed. Uses MacArthur Highway (main Caloocan/Valenzuela arterial) into Manila via Rizal Ave. Source: Moovit, other-major-terminals.

routes.route_name: T112: Monumento–Paco, Obando via M.H. del Pilar
routes.notes: LTFRB T-code T112. Listed in MC 2020-029 Annex A. Cross-boundary route Caloocan→Bulacan via M.H. del Pilar (NOT MacArthur Highway). Sources: LTFRB official.

LTFRB T-code T215. Listed in MC 2020-029 Annex A. Intra-Marikina circulation route between Parang and the Marikina city proper terminal. TP = Transport Point (Marikina's central terminal). Source: LTFRB.

LTFRB T-code T217. Listed in MC 2020-029 Annex A. Uses P. Tuazon corridor (different from T242 which uses Aurora Blvd). Note: T242 (Calumpang–LRT-2 Katipunan via Aurora) is validated in Aurora Blvd corridor. This route heads to Cubao via P. Tuazon/20th Ave. Source: LTFRB.

routes.route_name: T271: Cubao–Parang via 20th Ave / P. Tuazon
routes.notes: LTFRB T-code T271. From LTFRB franchise data. Uses 20th Ave/P. Tuazon corridor (NOT Aurora Blvd — that is T286/T287). Reverse of T217 conceptually but different code. Status uncertain under PUVMP modernization. Source: LTFRB franchise list.
